# WhisperShortcut 7.78

Review-prompt reliability release.

## Installation

Download the latest build from the [Releases page](https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/releases), move **WhisperShortcut.app** to your Applications folder, and launch it.

## What's New

### Fixes
- **The in-app review prompt now actually fires.** Its success counter used to reset on every app update, so with frequent releases it never reached the threshold. The counter now survives updates, and a pending prompt can also appear when you open the chat window — not only the menu bar menu. Apple's system limit (at most 3 prompts per year) still applies, so this stays non-intrusive.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/compare/v7.77...v7.78
